content:
# Convolutional Neural Network

**Summary**: A class of deep neural networks most commonly employed for analyzing visual imagery.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] implemented a CNN architecture to perform lithofacies classification and clast detection.

- [[2024-jibrin|Jibrin, 2024]] implemented a U-net architecture (a type of CNN) to perform semantic image segmentation of rock components.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-jibrin|Jibrin, 2024]] implemented a U-net architecture (a type of CNN) to perform semantic image segmentation of rock components.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The custom CNN achieved 65.3% accuracy on the lithofacies dataset, significantly lower than the DINOv2 + SVM approach. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 48]])

- The U-net model achieved an IoU of 97% and showed the best performance in capturing fine details of each rock type. ([[2024-jibrin|Jibrin, 2024, p. 72]])
